title:
Lesson 1:
Fun / Boring
description: 'Eğlenceli' = It's fun / entertaining. 'Sıkıcı' = It's boring. These adjectives describe experiences and places. 'Sıkıldım' = I got bored (personal feeling).

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Çok eğlenceliydi. Bütün gece dans ettik.
dialogue.english: It was really fun. We danced all night.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: No, it was very boring. I fell asleep.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Ha! It seemed boring to me too.
